panels.title: DICOM Files Received
panels.description: Total DICOM files ingested into the pipeline (all time).

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dicom_insert
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT study_instance_uid) FROM dicom_insert
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM patient_id_map
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nifti_conversion WHERE status = 'completed'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM calculation_status WHERE status = TRUE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM radiomics_manager
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pacs_archive WHERE status = 'archived'

panels.title: Total Errors
panels.description: Sum of NIfTI failures, DVH failures, PACS failures, and XNAT conflicts.

targets.rawSql: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM calculation_status WHERE status = FALSE) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nifti_conversion WHERE status = 'failed') + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pacs_archive WHERE status = 'failed') + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pacs_archive WHERE xnat_status = 'conflict') AS errors

panels.title: Receive + Anonymize
panels.description: Average time from first to last DICOM file per patient.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM duration))::numeric, 1) FROM (SELECT patient_id, MAX(timestamp) - MIN(timestamp) AS duration FROM dicom_insert WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) GROUP BY patient_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) sub
SELECT ROUND((COUNT(*)::numeric / NULLIF(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (MAX(timestamp) - MIN(timestamp))), 0))::numeric, 1) AS "files/s" FROM dicom_insert WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)

panels.title: NIfTI Conversion
panels.description: Average time per RTSTRUCT to NIfTI conversion.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (completed_at - started_at)))::numeric, 1) FROM nifti_conversion WHERE status = 'completed' AND $__timeFilter(completed_at)

SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 1 THEN ROUND((EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (MAX(timestamp) - MIN(timestamp))) / NULLIF(COUNT(*) - 1, 0))::numeric, 1) END FROM calculation_status WHERE status = TRUE AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)

SELECT ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM duration))::numeric, 1) FROM (SELECT patient_id, MAX(archived_at) - MIN(queued_at) AS duration FROM pacs_archive WHERE status = 'archived' AND $__timeFilter(archived_at) GROUP BY patient_id) sub

panels.title: Receive → NIfTI
panels.description: End-to-end time from first DICOM received to NIfTI conversion completed.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (nc.completed_at - di.first_received)))::numeric, 1) FROM nifti_conversion nc JOIN (SELECT patient_id, MIN(timestamp) AS first_received FROM dicom_insert GROUP BY patient_id) di ON di.patient_id = nc.patient_id WHERE nc.status = 'completed' AND $__timeFilter(nc.completed_at)
SELECT date_trunc('minute', timestamp) AS time, COUNT(*) AS "files" FROM dicom_insert WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT date_trunc('minute', archived_at) AS time, COUNT(*) AS "archived" FROM pacs_archive WHERE $__timeFilter(archived_at) AND status = 'archived' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT date_trunc('minute', timestamp) AS time, COUNT(*) AS "completed" FROM calculation_status WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND status = TRUE GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT modality, COUNT(*) AS count FROM dicom_insert GROUP BY modality ORDER BY count DESC

panels.title: Patient Pipeline Status
panels.description: End-to-end progress for each anonymised patient. Red cells indicate failures.

targets.rawSql: SELECT p.generated_patient_id AS patient_id, COALESCE(ct.n, 0) AS ct_files, COALESCE(rs.n, 0) AS rtstruct, COALESCE(rd.n, 0) AS rtdose, COALESCE(rp.n, 0) AS rtplan, COALESCE(nc.completed, 0) AS nifti_ok, COALESCE(nc.failed, 0) AS nifti_failed, COALESCE(nc.masks, 0) AS masks, COALESCE(dvh.rois, 0) AS dvh_rois, COALESCE(rad.jobs, 0) AS radiomics, ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (di_t.last_file - di_t.first_file))::numeric, 1) AS anon_secs FROM patient_id_map p LEFT JOIN (SELECT patient_id, COUNT(*) n FROM dicom_insert WHERE modality='CT' GROUP BY 1) ct ON ct.patient_id = p.generated_patient_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT patient_id, COUNT(*) n FROM dicom_insert WHERE modality='RTSTRUCT' GROUP BY 1) rs ON rs.patient_id = p.generated_patient_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT patient_id, COUNT(*) n FROM dicom_insert WHERE modality='RTDOSE' GROUP BY 1) rd ON rd.patient_id = p.generated_patient_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT patient_id, COUNT(*) n FROM dicom_insert WHERE modality='RTPLAN' GROUP BY 1) rp ON rp.patient_id = p.generated_patient_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT patient_id, SUM(CASE WHEN status='completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) completed, SUM(CASE WHEN status='failed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) failed, SUM(COALESCE(mask_count,0)) masks FROM nifti_conversion GROUP BY 1) nc ON nc.patient_id = p.generated_patient_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT di.patient_id, COUNT(DISTINCT dp.roi_name) rois FROM dvh_package dp JOIN dicom_insert di ON dp.sop_instance_uid = di.sop_instance_uid GROUP BY 1) dvh ON dvh.patient_id = p.generated_patient_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT di.patient_id, COUNT(DISTINCT rm.radiomics_id) jobs FROM radiomics_manager rm JOIN dicom_insert di ON rm.sop_instance_uid = di.sop_instance_uid GROUP BY 1) rad ON rad.patient_id = p.generated_patient_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT patient_id, MIN(timestamp) AS first_file, MAX(timestamp) AS last_file FROM dicom_insert GROUP BY patient_id) di_t ON di_t.patient_id = p.generated_patient_id ORDER BY p.generated_patient_id
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT study_instance_uid) FROM pacs_archive WHERE status = 'archived'
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT study_instance_uid) FROM pacs_archive WHERE xnat_status = 'verified'
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT study_instance_uid) FROM pacs_archive WHERE status = 'archived' AND xnat_status = 'pending'
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT study_instance_uid) FROM pacs_archive WHERE xnat_status = 'conflict'
SELECT modality, COUNT(*) as count FROM pacs_archive WHERE xnat_status = 'verified' GROUP BY modality ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT pa.patient_id, SUM(CASE WHEN pa.modality='CT' AND pa.xnat_status='verified' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as ct_verified, SUM(CASE WHEN pa.modality='RTSTRUCT' AND pa.xnat_status='verified' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rtstruct_verified, SUM(CASE WHEN pa.modality='RTDOSE' AND pa.xnat_status='verified' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rtdose_verified, SUM(CASE WHEN pa.modality='RTPLAN' AND pa.xnat_status='verified' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rtplan_verified, SUM(CASE WHEN pa.xnat_status='pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pending, SUM(CASE WHEN pa.xnat_status='conflict' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as conflicts FROM pacs_archive pa GROUP BY pa.patient_id ORDER BY pa.patient_id
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pacs_archive WHERE status = 'pending'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nifti_conversion WHERE status = 'failed'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nifti_conversion WHERE status = 'pending'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nifti_masks
SELECT date_trunc('minute', completed_at) AS time, COUNT(*) AS "completed" FROM nifti_conversion WHERE status = 'completed' AND $__timeFilter(completed_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT roi_name) FROM dvh_package
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dvh_result
SELECT roi_name, COUNT(*) as count FROM dvh_package GROUP BY roi_name ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT dp.roi_name, ROUND(AVG(dr.mean_dose)::numeric, 2) as avg_mean_dose, ROUND(AVG(dr.max_dose)::numeric, 2) as avg_max_dose FROM dvh_result dr JOIN dvh_package dp ON dr.result_id = dp.result_id GROUP BY dp.roi_name ORDER BY avg_mean_dose DESC LIMIT 25

panels.title: Dose Metrics by ROI (D2 / D50 / D95)

targets.rawSql: SELECT dp.roi_name, ROUND(AVG(dr.d2)::numeric, 2) as avg_d2, ROUND(AVG(dr.d50)::numeric, 2) as avg_d50, ROUND(AVG(dr.d95)::numeric, 2) as avg_d95 FROM dvh_result dr JOIN dvh_package dp ON dr.result_id = dp.result_id GROUP BY dp.roi_name ORDER BY avg_d50 DESC LIMIT 25

SELECT di.patient_id, dp.roi_name, dr.d2, dr.d50, dr.d95, dr.d98, dr.min_dose, dr.mean_dose, dr.max_dose FROM dvh_result dr JOIN dvh_package dp ON dr.result_id = dp.result_id JOIN dicom_insert di ON dp.sop_instance_uid = di.sop_instance_uid ORDER BY dr.result_id DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT roi_name) FROM radiomics_results
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM radiomics_results
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT di.patient_id) FROM radiomics_manager rm JOIN dicom_insert di ON rm.sop_instance_uid = di.sop_instance_uid
SELECT roi_name, COUNT(*) as count FROM radiomics_results GROUP BY roi_name ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT roi_name, ROUND(AVG(diag_image_mean)::numeric, 2) as avg_image_mean, ROUND(AVG(diag_image_minimum)::numeric, 2) as avg_image_min, ROUND(AVG(diag_image_maximum)::numeric, 2) as avg_image_max FROM radiomics_results GROUP BY roi_name ORDER BY avg_image_mean DESC LIMIT 25

SELECT di.patient_id, rm.sop_instance_uid AS study_uid, di.timestamp AS received_at, COUNT(DISTINCT rr.roi_name) AS roi_count FROM radiomics_manager rm JOIN dicom_insert di ON rm.sop_instance_uid = di.sop_instance_uid LEFT JOIN radiomics_results rr ON rr.radiomics_id = rm.radiomics_id GROUP BY di.patient_id, rm.sop_instance_uid, di.timestamp ORDER BY di.timestamp DESC LIMIT 50
